data.name: Bubbles & Babes
data.detailed_description:
Adult Visual Novel

Return home to save your father's mountain bathhouse business. Explore freely, interact with unique characters, and experience naughty encounters through fully voiced dialogue and animated scenes.

Your Story Begins...

Life in the big city comes crashing to a halt when you're suddenly called home to save the bathhouse that's now been handed to you. Perched high in the mountains, this isn't your typical spa - and neither are its guests. At least you've got familiar faces to help keep things running.

Gameplay Features:

  • Free exploration - Navigate the bathhouse and surrounding mountain areas at your own pace

  • Relationship building - Reconnect with old friends and get to know your employees and guests through fully voiced conversations

  • Multiple characters - 5 main characters and plenty of side characters, each with their own personalities and storylines

  • Adult content - Progress through the story to unlock intimate animated scenes with different characters

  • Fully voiced English dialogue - Every conversation is brought to life with professional English voice acting

  • Animated scenes - High-quality animations for all adult content

data.short_description: Adult visual novel set in a mountain bathhouse. Explore freely, reconnect with old friends and employees, and unlock intimate encounters. Features full English voice acting and animated adult scenes.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註:
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.4 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註:

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04, Kernel 3.x, or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
